options.name: -filter
options.description: Filters a collection based on the specified expression. For any arcs that match the pattern, the software evaluates the expression based on the attribute of the arc

options.name: -from
options.description: Adds all timing arcs that fan in directly to the specified pins or ports to the collection

options.name: -of_objects
options.description: Adds all timing arcs that are associated with the specified cells or nets to the collection

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Suppresses all error and warning messages generated when the get_arcs command is run

options.name: -to
options.description: Adds all timing arcs that fan out directly from the specified list of pins or ports to the collection
